site.title: Cosmin Calin
site.description: Personal portfolio of Cosmin Calin — System Administrator at T-Systems Iberia (Deutsche Telekom Technik international team), independent developer of native macOS apps, web tools and Ansible-managed infrastructure.

hero.role: System Administrator (N2 — SysOps) at T-Systems Iberia, currently on the international team for Deutsche Telekom Technik.
hero.summary: On evenings and weekends I build small things that try to be useful: a Bible presenter for macOS, an ICS calendar editor that actually understands recurrence rules, a hardened Ansible setup for my own VPS.

about.title: About
about.intro: Born in 2001 in Romania, raised in Tarragona, working in Reus. Bilingual at home (Catalan and Spanish), Romanian with family, English at work.
philosophyItems: Boring infrastructure: predictable, automated, documented. Excitement belongs in features, not in operations.
Code that reads like you meant it. Naming, structure and tests before clever tricks.
Tools for the people I know — churches, kids, small teams — first; for everyone else, second.
about.outsideWork: Local church involvement, family, reading, the occasional hike around Tarragona. Slow runner.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: The fastest way to reach me is email. I read everything, reply to most of it within a few days.
contact.pgpHint: Want to send something sensitive? Email me first and ask for my PGP key.

footer.builtWith: Built with Astro, React and Tailwind
